text:
There was once a boy named Ralph.

One night, Ralph dreamed about a magical library where anything was written down. He knew he had to find this library. When he woke up, he immediately set out. After walking a long, lonely road, Ralph stumbled upon a door, ancient-looking and mysterious.

It was unlocked. Ralph pushed it open.

Inside was a great library filled with every book you could imagine. Some were leather-bound, others shiny metallic. They all glowed softly whenever you thought about the pages. In the far corner sat a librarian. Her hair was white, like snow.

"You must be Ralph." She smiled. "In a world where books are all-powerful, I’m the librarianship keeper. It's my job to keep these wonders safe."

Ralph asked, "How do I choose which book to find my adventures?"

She grinned, reading from an ancient-looking tome next to her.

"Book four, ‘ Adventures in the Forest of Whispers’. Pages
